research_notes: 3 officers found on /corporate/ page. 代表取締役社長 馬郡恵太, 取締役 高野博司, 取締役 石綿丈二. Special subsidiary (特例子会社) of I-NET Corp. established 2009, 37 employees (27 with disabilities). No LinkedIn or Twitter links found.
